questions.question: Describe the key differences between SMS and LCS in terms of data transmission, latency and cost. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the technical aspects and limitations of each technology.

questions.question: Design a simple Android application that integrates SMS and Location Based Services to send a message to a user's emergency contact in case of an SOS situation. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the user interface, data flow and database schema.

questions.question: Explain how SQLite database can be used to store and manage the location history data of a user's mobile device, and describe its advantages over other database systems. (12 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the data model, data storage and query optimization.
